title: Zakir Khan Live — Sakht Launda Tour
description: The beloved stand-up comedian is back with his biggest tour yet. Expect relatable stories, Sakht Launda vibes, and an evening of non-stop laughter.

title: Imagica Theme Park — Special Pass
description: Experience India's hottest theme park with 100+ rides, snow world, water park, and live entertainment. Special discounted passes available.

title: Hamlet — The Modern Retelling
description: A critically acclaimed modern retelling of Shakespeare's masterpiece, set in corporate India. Winner of 4 national theatre awards.

title: KidZania Mumbai — School Holiday Special
description: The city for kids! Let your child explore 80+ role-play activities — be a doctor, pilot, chef, banker, and more! Holiday special extended hours.

title: Arijit Singh — Unplugged Concert
description: India's most beloved singer performs live in the most intimate setting of his career. Acoustic renditions of your favourite songs. This will sell out fast!

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: A hands-on 2-day workshop covering Figma, design systems, user research, and portfolio building. Led by senior designers from Google & Amazon.

title: Full Stack React Bootcamp
description: 4-week intensive training in React, Node.js, MongoDB, and deployment. Includes live projects, mentorship, and placement assistance.

title: Rishikesh River Rafting & Camping
description: 2-day adventure package including white water rafting (Grade 3-4 rapids), bungee jumping, overnight camping, bonfire, and all meals included.

title: Kapil Sharma — New Show Launch
description: The King of Comedy is back live on stage! Unfiltered, uncensored, and absolutely hilarious. Don't miss his first live show in 3 years!

title: Ed Sheeran — Mathematics Tour India
description: Global superstar Ed Sheeran brings his record-breaking Mathematics Tour to India for the first time! One night only — don't miss it!
